title: AliCloud CIEM: OSS Bucket Made Public then Objects Accessed
description: Attack chain: OSS bucket ACL was changed to public-read, followed by mass object access — indicating deliberate data staging for exfiltration.

title: AliCloud CIEM: Role Created with Broad Trust then Assumed
description: Correlated attack chain: a RAM role with broad trust policy was created, then immediately assumed via STS. Classic privilege escalation via role trust policy manipulation.

title: AliCloud CIEM: Logging Disabled then Data Access
description: Correlated defense evasion + data exfiltration: ActionTrail logging was stopped or a trail deleted, followed by OSS bucket policy changes or snapshot sharing — classic pre-exfil pattern.

title: AliCloud CIEM: Policy Attachment Followed by Access Key Creation
description: Correlated privilege escalation + persistence: a RAM policy was attached (privilege escalation) then an access key was created within the same session (backdoor).

title: AliCloud CIEM: Access Key Used Past Rotation Deadline
description: An access key was used significantly past its rotation deadline — a persistence indicator for stale credentials retained by an adversary.

title: AliCloud ECS: Cloud Assistant Command Created
description: A new Cloud Assistant command script was created. Pre-staging malicious commands before invocation is a common technique to reduce noise at execution time.

title: AliCloud ECS: SSH Key Pair Created
description: An SSH key pair was created. Adversaries create new key pairs to establish persistent SSH access to instances independent of password-based authentication.

title: AliCloud ECS: Disk Snapshot Created
description: A disk snapshot was created. Adversaries create snapshots of data volumes to stage exfiltration — sharing the snapshot with an attacker-controlled account.

title: AliCloud ECS: External SSH Public Key Imported
description: An externally-generated SSH public key was imported into AliCloud. Importing attacker-controlled keys enables persistent SSH access to any instance it's attached to.

title: AliCloud ECS: Instance Metadata Service Config Changed
description: IMDSv2-equivalent settings on an ECS instance were modified. Disabling token-required metadata access re-enables SSRF-based credential theft.

title: AliCloud ECS: Security Group Inbound Rule Added (All Traffic)
description: A security group inbound rule was added. Rules permitting 0.0.0.0/0 expose instances to internet-wide access and are a common misconfiguration exploited for initial access.

title: AliCloud ECS: Instance User Data Modified
description: ECS instance user data was modified. User data runs as root on next boot — adversaries inject malicious scripts for persistence or lateral movement.

title: AliCloud ECS: Security Group Inbound Rule Deleted
description: A security group rule was deleted. Adversaries remove security controls to enable lateral movement or cover their tracks.

title: AliCloud ECS: Remote Command Invoked via Cloud Assistant
description: ECS Cloud Assistant InvokeCommand was called to execute a command on a running instance. This is equivalent to AWS SSM RunCommand and is abused for remote code execution via the control plane.

title: AliCloud ECS: Stopped Instance Started
description: A previously stopped ECS instance was started. Adversaries may start instances to use dormant credentials, access stored data, or use compute resources for crypto mining.

title: AliCloud ACK: Kubernetes Cluster Deleted
description: An ACK Kubernetes cluster was deleted. Cluster deletion destroys all workloads, persistent volumes, and configurations — a high-impact denial of service technique.

title: AliCloud ACK: Cluster Kubeconfig Downloaded
description: A Kubernetes cluster kubeconfig was downloaded via DescribeClusterUserKubeconfig. Kubeconfigs contain credentials — exfiltrating one provides full kubectl access to the cluster.

title: AliCloud ACK: Cluster API Server Access Configuration Changed
description: The cluster's public API server endpoint configuration was changed. Enabling public API server access exposes the Kubernetes control plane to the internet.

title: AliCloud ACR: Container Image Pushed to Registry
description: A container image was pushed to ACR. Adversaries inject malicious images into registries to compromise workloads that pull from them (supply chain attack).

title: AliCloud RDS: DB Master Account Created
description: A new database account was created with elevated privileges. Adversaries create admin DB accounts for persistent data access.

title: AliCloud RDS: Database Instance Created
description: A new RDS database instance was created. Adversaries create DB instances to exfiltrate data by importing it into attacker-controlled databases.

title: AliCloud RDS: Automated Backup Policy Disabled
description: RDS automated backup was disabled or the backup retention period was set to zero. This enables ransomware attacks — data can be encrypted with no recovery path.

title: AliCloud RDS: DB Instance Network Type Changed to Public
description: An RDS instance was switched to a public network endpoint. Publicly accessible databases are directly reachable from the internet, increasing attack surface.

title: AliCloud DataWorks: Data Export Job Created
description: A DataWorks data export or synchronization task was created. Adversaries create export tasks to bulk-exfiltrate data warehouse or lake contents to external systems.

title: AliCloud DMS: SQL Query Exported to File
description: A DMS (Data Management Service) data export was initiated. Bulk SQL exports bypass row-level security and audit controls, enabling large-scale data exfiltration.

title: AliCloud ECS: Disk Snapshot Shared with External Account
description: An ECS disk snapshot was shared with another Alibaba Cloud account. Sharing snapshots is a primary data exfiltration technique — copying all disk data to an external account.

title: AliCloud IMS: User Added to RAM Group
description: A user was added to a RAM group. Group membership grants all attached group policies, potentially elevating privileges.

title: AliCloud STS: Role Assumed via AssumeRole
description: An STS AssumeRole call was made, creating temporary credentials for another role. Lateral movement via role assumption is a core cloud attack technique.

title: AliCloud STS: Role Assumed via SAML Federation
description: A role was assumed via SAML federation (AssumeRoleWithSAML). Adversaries forge SAML assertions (Golden SAML) to gain access to any role in the account.

title: AliCloud RAM: Policy Attached to Role
description: A policy was attached to a RAM role, potentially granting elevated privileges. Attackers attach admin policies to escalate permissions via role assumption.

title: AliCloud RAM: Policy Attached to User
description: A policy was attached directly to a RAM user. Direct user policies bypass group-based access control and are harder to audit at scale.

title: AliCloud IMS: MFA Device Bound to User
description: An MFA device was bound to a RAM user. Monitor for adversary-controlled MFA enrollment on compromised accounts to maintain persistent access.

title: AliCloud IMS: Access Key Created
description: A new access key was created for a RAM user. Access keys provide programmatic access and are high-value targets for credential theft.

title: AliCloud RAM: Custom Policy Created
description: A new custom RAM policy was created. Adversaries create permissive policies with wildcard actions/resources to enable privilege escalation.

title: AliCloud RAM: Role Created
description: A new RAM role was created. Adversaries create roles with overly permissive trust policies to enable cross-account or federated privilege escalation.

title: AliCloud RAM: Service-Linked Role Created
description: A service-linked role was created for an AliCloud service. Monitor for unauthorized service enablement that grants broad service-level permissions.

title: AliCloud IMS: RAM User Created
description: A new RAM user was created. Adversaries create cloud accounts to maintain persistent access without deploying traditional remote access tools.

title: AliCloud RAM: Role Deleted
description: A RAM role was deleted. Deleting service roles can disrupt legitimate services; adversaries may delete security-monitoring roles to blind defenders.

title: AliCloud IMS: RAM User Deleted
description: A RAM user was deleted. Adversaries may delete users to cover tracks or deny access to legitimate administrators.

title: AliCloud IMS: MFA Device Disabled
description: MFA was disabled for a RAM user. Removing MFA weakens authentication and enables password-only login, increasing account takeover risk.

title: AliCloud IMS: Account Password Policy Modified
description: The RAM account password policy was changed. Weakening the policy (reducing complexity, shortening expiry) increases risk of brute-force attacks.

title: AliCloud RAM: Policy Default Version Updated
description: The default version of a RAM policy was changed. Adversaries set a previously created permissive policy version as default to escalate privileges.

title: AliCloud IMS: Account Security Preferences Modified
description: Account-level security preferences (MFA enforcement, session duration, IP restrictions) were changed. Adversaries weaken these settings to persist access more easily.

title: AliCloud IMS: Disabled Access Key Re-Enabled
description: A previously disabled access key was re-enabled. Adversaries may re-enable dormant keys to regain access without creating new credentials.

title: AliCloud IMS: Console Login Password Changed
description: A RAM user's console login password was updated. Adversaries reset passwords to take over accounts or lock out legitimate users.

title: AliCloud RAM: Role Trust Policy Modified
description: The trust policy of a RAM role was updated. Adversaries broaden trust policies to allow unauthorized principals (external accounts, public) to assume the role.

title: AliCloud KMS: KMS Key Created
description: A new KMS key was created. Monitor to detect unauthorized key creation that may be used to re-encrypt data for ransom or for unauthorized cryptographic operations.

title: AliCloud KMS: Secret Created in Secrets Manager
description: A new secret was created in KMS Secrets Manager. Monitor for unauthorized secret creation that may store stolen credentials for later retrieval.

title: AliCloud KMS: Secret Deleted from Secrets Manager
description: A secret was deleted from Secrets Manager. Deleting credentials can cause service disruptions and removes forensic evidence of what was stored.

title: AliCloud KMS: Key Disabled
description: A KMS key was disabled. Disabling a key immediately prevents decryption, causing data unavailability for all services using it.

title: AliCloud KMS: Key Policy Modified
description: A KMS key policy was updated. Adversaries add cross-account grant access to keys to exfiltrate data by decrypting it in an external account.

title: AliCloud KMS: Key Scheduled for Deletion
description: A KMS key was scheduled for deletion. Deleting keys destroys all data encrypted with them — a powerful ransomware-like impact attack.

title: AliCloud CloudMonitor: Security Alarm Rule Deleted
description: A CloudMonitor alarm rule was deleted. Removing alerts for suspicious operations prevents real-time detection of attacks.

title: AliCloud ActionTrail: Audit Trail Deleted
description: An ActionTrail trail was deleted, eliminating audit log collection. This is a critical defense evasion indicator — attackers blind the security team before executing their objective.

title: AliCloud Config: Configuration Recorder Stopped
description: The AliCloud Config configuration recorder was stopped. This disables continuous compliance monitoring and resource configuration tracking.

title: AliCloud ActionTrail: Trail Logging Stopped
description: ActionTrail logging was stopped on an existing trail. Events occurring while logging is stopped are unrecorded — a critical gap for incident response.

title: AliCloud ActionTrail: Trail Configuration Modified
description: An ActionTrail trail was reconfigured. Changing the trail's OSS destination or filtering settings can redirect or suppress audit logs.

title: AliCloud VPC: NAT Gateway Created
description: A NAT Gateway was created, enabling outbound internet access from private subnets. Adversaries create NAT gateways to establish command-and-control egress from compromised instances.

title: AliCloud VPC: Route Table Entry Added
description: A route was added to a VPC route table. Adversaries inject routes to redirect traffic through attacker-controlled endpoints (traffic hijacking).

title: AliCloud VPC: New VPC Created
description: A new VPC was created. Adversaries create VPCs to host attack infrastructure, pivot resources, or evade detection by operating in isolated networks.

title: AliCloud VPN: VPN Gateway Created
description: A new VPN gateway was created. Adversaries establish VPN tunnels to create persistent, encrypted backdoor channels into the VPC network.

title: AliCloud VPC: VPC Deleted
description: A VPC was deleted. Deleting production VPCs causes network isolation of all contained resources and is an impact/denial-of-service technique.

title: AliCloud OSS: Bucket Deleted
description: An OSS bucket was deleted. Bucket deletion is irreversible — adversaries delete buckets to destroy evidence, deny service, or eliminate compliance records.

title: AliCloud OSS: Bucket Encryption Disabled
description: Server-side encryption was removed from an OSS bucket. Data written after this change will be stored unencrypted, violating data-at-rest requirements.

title: AliCloud OSS: Bucket Access Logging Disabled
description: Access logging for an OSS bucket was disabled. This removes forensic evidence of data access, helping adversaries cover exfiltration activity.

title: AliCloud OSS: Bucket Policy Deleted
description: An OSS bucket policy was deleted. Removing bucket policies may re-enable broad access if ACLs are not restrictive.

title: AliCloud OSS: Bucket Made Publicly Readable
description: An OSS bucket ACL was set to public-read or public-read-write, exposing all objects to unauthenticated internet access.

title: AliCloud OSS: Bucket Policy Modified
description: An OSS bucket policy was added or updated. Adversaries craft policies that grant cross-account access or allow unauthenticated reads to exfiltrate data.

title: AliCloud API Gateway: API Backend Modified
description: An API Gateway API's backend target was updated. Adversaries modify backends to redirect API traffic to attacker-controlled endpoints for credential harvesting.

title: AliCloud CEN: VPC Attached to Cloud Enterprise Network
description: A VPC was attached to a Cloud Enterprise Network (CEN) instance. Unauthorized CEN attachments can create unintended lateral movement paths across accounts.

title: AliCloud Config: Compliance Rule Deleted
description: A Config compliance rule was deleted, removing a continuous compliance check. Adversaries delete rules before making non-compliant changes to avoid alerts.

title: AliCloud EventBridge: Event Rule Deleted
description: An EventBridge event rule was deleted. Removing rules that trigger security responses (e.g., auto-remediation) disables automated defenses.

title: AliCloud EventBridge: Event Rule Modified
description: An EventBridge rule was modified. Adversaries alter rule patterns or targets to suppress security alerts or redirect events to attacker-controlled endpoints.

title: AliCloud WAF: WAF Protection Rule Deleted
description: A WAF rule was deleted, removing a security control protecting web applications from SQL injection, XSS, or DDoS. Attackers remove WAF rules before launching application attacks.

title: AliCloud FC: Function Created
description: A new Function Compute function was created. Adversaries deploy malicious functions for persistent execution, cryptomining, or as a C2 relay.

title: AliCloud FC: Function Trigger Created
description: A new trigger (HTTP, OSS event, timer, MNS) was created for a Function Compute function. Adversaries create triggers to schedule persistent malicious execution.

title: AliCloud FC: Function Directly Invoked via API
description: A Function Compute function was directly invoked via the management API. Direct invocations (outside normal triggers) may indicate adversary testing or execution of planted code.

title: AliCloud FC: Function Code Updated
description: An existing Function Compute function's code or configuration was updated. Adversaries hijack legitimate functions to execute malicious code under trusted identities.

title: AliCloud Security Center: Security Finding Deleted
description: A Security Center finding was permanently deleted. Deleting findings removes evidence needed for incident investigation and compliance auditing.

title: AliCloud Security Center: Threat Alert Dismissed
description: A Security Center (SAS) threat alert was dismissed or ignored. Adversaries dismiss alerts to suppress detection of their own malicious activity.
